All right, welcome back to the legacy coaching program. So we are now digging into coaching coordinators. All right, so who are coaching coordinators? The coaching coordinators are gym launch employees that work alongside the legacy coaches. All right, they will help you with everything that you need outside of the actual coaching. So they're the people that are really going to be assisting the coaches and working with you guys and in between you guys and the coaches. So some of the things that they'll be doing are scheduling meetings, collecting your KPIs to show your coaches, getting you started with your coach, whether that is you just signed up for legacy or you're moving to a new coach, they're going to be the ones that introduce you and help get you jump started, sending you action plans. So after you meet with your coach and they say like, this is what we need to do. We've identified the issue. Like, this is the plan that we need to execute. I'm going to have so and so send you all this stuff. We'll do all this stuff. They'll be the person actually sending it. Sending reminders and updates. So if you have a reminder for a monthly Zoom call that you have with your coach or there's an update to some training that we think is amazing and you got to check out, they'll be the ones sending that stuff to you, transitioning you from one class to another. So if you graduate from one of your classes and you move into a different class, they'll be the ones that are removing you from one and putting you in the other. And then they'll be monitoring those Facebook groups. So your private Facebook groups that you have with the coaches, these are a few things that they do. It's not everything they do, but this is a lot of the stuff that you'll be seeing them do. Now, whoops, we went over all this stuff. They absolutely or they're absolute rock stars and have been through the same training and passed the same test as your coaches have. So they're really squared away when it comes to knowing everything that you'll guys need to do to crush your business. They just don't have the experience of running a gym, but they're really knowledgeable and did go through the whole training course that the coaches did. So to reach them, all you have to do is tag them in your Facebook group with a question or send them a message in Facebook Messenger. Use their gym launch profile, please. Use their personal profiles if you are friends with them or if you have them. But it's super simple. Just like you would get a hold of somebody in the legacy group now, same deal. Just tag them and say, have a question for you or shoot them a message. They'll introduce themselves to you as soon as you get into the program. That way you know who they are. So they'll be onboarding you guys into the program and they'll let you know like the easiest way to get a hold of them as well, whether it's email or whatever. So it shouldn't be hard to get in touch with them. Now, the last thing I'll say about the coaching coordinators is they are, they're awesome. They know exactly what you guys are going through and when it comes to optimizing or improving your business and they know the goals of the coaching program. So I think you'll absolutely enjoy working with them. The coaches love them. So please make sure that you are just as fired up about working with them as you are with the coaches and they'll be, they'll really be able to help you guys crush it.
